score_types.label: Tile VP
score_types.description: Victory points printed on each improvement tile you own

score_types.label: Gentry VP
score_types.description: Victory points from gentry cards in your hand at end of game

score_types.label: Objective VP
score_types.description: Points from the two objective cards dealt at game start

score_types.label: Reputation VP
score_types.description: Points from reputation track level (1/3/6/10/15/21/28 for levels 1-7)

score_types.label: Servant VP
score_types.description: 2 victory points per servant in your service at end of game

score_types.label: VP Cards
score_types.description: Victory points from any VP cards earned during the game (including Fairchild cards from courtship)
